product.name: Window Safety Guards for Children Kids Toddler,Adjustable 32.9"-61.4" Wide Window Security Bar, Child Safety Guard Prevents Accidental Falls (White, 2 Piece)
features: 【Secure and Durable】Made of durable steel, the surface of the window safety guards is painted, smooth without burrs to prevent babies from being scratched. Our safety window guards have been tested and can withstand 220 pounds of pressure and 110 pounds of impact.

【Security Design】The gap between the bars of the child window guard is 2.68 inches, making it impossible for a child to fall through. This window safety guard for children can be removed in case of an emergency. Disassembly is easy and simple—just adjust the tension of the bolts.

【Easy Installation】Pressure-mounted, no drilling or holes required, so it won’t damage windows or walls. It allows flexible installation, either horizontally or vertically. Simply adjust the length of the four bolts to control the tightness of the child safety window guard.

【Adjusatble to Fit Various Window Widths】Our window safety bar fits most styles of windows, such as flat window, fixed window, bay window, sliding window, removable sliding window, etc. There are 4 sizes for chioce 32.9"-35"(1 panel), 20.5"-41.3"(2 panels),32.9"-61.4"(2 panels) and 32.9"-94"(3 panels).

【Occasions】Our window security bar guard can protect your kids from window-falling accidents. With a simple, smooth design, its white paint complements room decor and won’t affect the overall aesthetics of the room.
